description:
What: Forward our own dst to the tail callee. No new alloc.

Why: Tail recursion must not allocate per iteration; this is what makes DPS pay off in loops.

CLIF impact: strict reduction — removes one alloc per loop iteration in DPS-shaped tail-recursive constructors.

Removes: per-iteration accumulator alloc in tail-recursive constructors.

Tests: golden CLIF on a tail-recursive list/vec builder fixture; assert zero allocs in the loop body.
title: fz-dps.C4: lower Term::TailCall/TailCallClosure under Dst ABI
